steps.title: Locate the right angle and the angle equal to $W$
steps.content: Check the Pythagorean theorem: $20^2+48^2=2704=52^2$, so the right angle is at $S$ and $TR$ is the hypotenuse. Since $T$ corresponds to $W$, $\tan W=\tan T$.

steps.title: Compute the tangent ratio
steps.content: For angle $T$, the opposite leg is $RS=20$ and the adjacent leg is $ST=48$. $$\tan W=\tan T=\frac{20}{48}=\frac{5}{12}.$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
